title: Hearts center
description: The mod has the hearts in the center. It is inspired by Squid Craft 2 and 3. You can modify the texture of the hearts in the mod.
body:
This mod relocates the health bar to the center of the screen, just like in Squid Craft 2 and Squid Craft 3. Ideal for content creators or players who want a more immersive, cinematic HUD layout.

Fully compatible with custom overlays and maintains a clean, functional experience.

## Commands

With this command, you can enable or disable the centered hearts for a specific player.

/hearts show <target> <true/false>

* `true` enables the hearts in the center of the screen.
* `false` disables the hearts in the center of the screen.
